title: Miami Bangor Code-Switching Annotation
description: Multi-tier annotation of Spanish-English bilingual speech for code-switching analysis. Annotators perform per-word language identification, mark code-switch boundaries and types, classify switch direction and utterance-level language dominance, and provide orthographic transcriptions -- all on parallel tiers aligned to the audio timeline (Deuchar et al., International Journal of Bilingualism 2014).
paperReference: Deuchar et al., International Journal of Bilingualism 2014
citation:
